positive: A minimalist, high-contrast silhouette illustration of a majestic fox leaping through a field of stylized wildflowers at dawn. The fox should be the central focus, captured in a powerful, dynamic pose. Use clean, crisp linework with solid color blocking and negative space. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream white, evoking a celestial, dreamy mood. Composition must be perfectly centered, optimized for apparel print placement. Style: Vector illustration, geometric tribal influence, Art Deco inspired.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, messy, jpeg artifacts
